objective: Enforce immutable-data guardrails for crawled public stash data and canonical persisted public-stash history during review execution.

data_plane: DROP TABLE on any immutable target
INSERT overwrite semantics that replace canonical history
control_plane: Replay reset of public stash cursor/checkpoint history
Manual checkpoint rewind/reset that rewrites canonical persisted history
Any non-allowlisted live POST mutation outside service restart allowlist
forbidden_actions.policy_text: Delete/overwrite/replay-reset/truncate actions against crawled public stash data and canonical persisted public-stash history are explicitly prohibited.

qa_only: Deterministic fixture seeding in QA-only datasets that do not modify live canonical history

enforcement.gate: If an operation touches immutable targets and is not an explicit read-only query, it is denied.
incident_response: Record attempted action and context in evidence
Escalate to orchestrator for explicit revised authorization
